attacking_style: Prefers late attacks on final climbs from breakaway positions rather than defending GC passively. Wins come from well-timed accelerations in final kilometers after long-range efforts.
team_tactics: Relies heavily on team support for positioning and recovering from setbacks (mechanical recovery required massive team expenditure). Less aggressive in using team for offensive GC defense.
terrain_preference: Medium mountain stages with breakaway opportunities suit best; final climb finishes where late attacks can drop rivals. Struggles in tactical sprint situations for time bonuses.
vulnerability: Passive GC race management when under pressure; vulnerable to time bonus losses in tactical sprints; mechanicals and crashes disproportionately compromise his races.
key_patterns: Exceptional energy management in long breakaways, maintaining power after 45+ minutes at threshold.
Vulnerable to crashes/mechanicals requiring chase efforts that compromise subsequent summit finishes (2019, 2022).
Prefers breakaway tactics over passive GC defense; lost podium without mounting active defense.
Strong resilience and improvisation under adversity, winning despite major mechanical disasters.
Weak in tactical sprinting for time bonuses despite climbing strength (lost seconds to rivals).
form_trajectory: positive: 2022 showed resurgent form with breakaway win and strong energy management at Vuelta after earlier Tour mechanicals, suggesting late-career renaissance as opportunistic stage hunter rather than pure GC contender
built_from: 2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 17
2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 17
